name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Windows)
notes: This Building Block detects when a user account is created.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000892) Success Audit: A user account was created
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000892) Success Audit: A user account was created
